query:
INSERT INTO business_positions (entityId, title, department, description, positionType, salaryMin, salaryMax, status, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES (1, 'Health Manager', 'Health', 'Oversees health and wellness programs, employee health initiatives, and health-related compliance. Manages health operations and coordinates with HR on employee wellness benefits.', 'full_time', 65000, 85000, 'open', NOW(), NOW());
